content: TanStack Start is a mature full-stack React framework (v1.0 released late 2025) built on TanStack Router + Vite + Nitro. Architecture: dual-bundle system (client/server), SSR with streaming, server functions via 'use server' directive enabling type-safe RPC. Route loaders run sequentially on SSR, data dehydrated into HTML for client hydration. Selective SSR per route. Integrates with TanStack Query via dehydrate/prefetchQuery/HydrationBoundary. Protected routes use beforeLoad with session check. File-based routing: critical config (loaders, beforeLoad) in main route file, lazy chunks in .lazy.tsx. Nitro enables deploy to Cloudflare Workers, Vercel, Fly.io, etc.
